title: Meals for Me
description: Led a 5-member team building a recipe discovery app with Firebase auth, realtime data sync, and the Edamam recipe API.
overview: A responsive recipe discovery application that helps users find meals based on their personal preferences. I led a 5-member team through the full development lifecycle, from planning and architecture to deployment.

sections.heading: What I Built
bullets: Led a team of 5 developers, coordinating feature ownership and code review
Implemented Google Firebase Authentication for secure sign-in and user account management
Used Firebase Realtime Database to save, store, and sync user data across sessions
Integrated Edamam's Recipe Search API to pull recipes matching user dietary preferences and restrictions
Built a fully responsive UI using React.js, HTML, and CSS
